title: Add user accounts, farmer testimonials, and mobile optimization

requirements.text: Add user account functionality so authenticated farmers can track their training progress. Display a personal dashboard showing enrolled courses, completion status, and any earned achievements or milestones.

quotes: User accounts so farmers can track their progress

acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users can see a 'My Progress' or profile section showing their enrolled courses
Each enrolled course shows a completion status or progress indicator
The progress data is persisted in the backend per user principal
Unauthenticated users are prompted to log in via Internet Identity to access progress tracking

requirements.text: Add a farmer testimonials section where real testimonials can be collected and displayed over time. Include a submission form for farmers to submit their own testimonial (name, location, quote, farming area) and display approved testimonials in a dedicated section on the homepage or a testimonials page.

quotes: A way to collect and display real farmer testimonials over time

acceptanceCriteria: A testimonial submission form is accessible to users, collecting name, location, quote, and farming area
Submitted testimonials are stored in the backend
Admins can approve or reject submitted testimonials via the admin panel
Approved testimonials are displayed in a testimonials section (homepage or dedicated page)
The testimonials display gracefully with fallback placeholder content if no testimonials exist yet

requirements.text: Audit and improve mobile responsiveness across all pages. Ensure navigation, cards, tables, hero sections, dashboards, and forms are fully usable on small screens (320px–768px). Fix any layout overflow, font size, spacing, or touch target issues found.

quotes: Mobile optimization check — farmers likely use phones more than desktops

acceptanceCriteria: All pages render without horizontal scroll on a 375px wide screen
Navigation collapses into a usable mobile menu
Cards, tables, and dashboards stack or scroll correctly on small screens
Buttons and interactive elements have adequate touch target sizes (minimum 44x44px)
Font sizes remain readable on mobile without requiring zoom
The hero section, forms, and FAQ accordion are fully functional on mobile

constraints: Preserve all existing features: search, language toggle, downloadable resources, blog, FAQ, WhatsApp contact button (77421966), store, SOPs, training, and GDP dashboard
Internet Identity remains the only authentication method
All backend logic must remain in the single main actor (backend/main.mo)
